violations.text: No PIC with food safety certification at time of inspection. PIC currently taking safe serve class. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (chlorine) sanitizing solution for the (3-bay sink) located in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2026

Observed the floor on the side of stove in kitchen area has a dead pest and other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2026
The ceiling tiles and walls in upstairs kitchen area were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Per the PIC, Food Safety Certificate has expired. Per the PIC, Food Safety Course is to be signed up for and completed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety that is registered with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection. Application supplied to the PIC at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025
